raw_consumer_statement:
Citi bank over charged me twice on XX/XX/year> for XXXX. Over the course of 2 months, I tried reaching out and repeatedly got no where, each one giving me a different answer, saying I will get the money back, another saying I won, even with the confirmation that they were supposed to send me back the money. 
I got my bank involved and my bank was able to get my money back, but citi card charged back that same amount that they gave the bank to me of {$2700.00}. 
I called and they refused to let me file a dispute, flat out. I called my bank again and she found evidence that I was over charged twice on XX/XX/year>. Now the statements have changed and Im still not able to file a dispute on their website.
